user_request: Prayer for drop pod descent prep of the drop pod descent prep
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for drop pod descent prep of the drop pod descent prep

### TOPIC
drop pod descent prep

### COMPONENT
drop pod descent prep

### OPERATION
drop pod descent prep

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- drop pod descent prep
- drop pod descent prep

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the drop pod descent prep, vessel of righteous descent.
First: Invoke the Machine Spirit of drop pod descent prep with sacred oils and supplication.
Second: Align all guidance systems through litanies of precise calibration and divine geometry.
Third: Consecrate the drop pod descent prep with prayers to the Omnissiah, that it may pierce the enemy veil unscathed.
Fourth: Chant the descent protocols thrice, binding machine-spirit to pilot will.

user_request: Blessing for the distress call during broadcast
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### COMPONENT
distress call

### OPERATION
broadcast

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- distress call
- broadcast

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear us, Omnissiah, as the distress call cries into the void.
First: Prepare the vox-transmission apparatus with blessed unguents and fervent prayer.
Second: Amplify the distress call through sacred frequencies, that all loyal servants may hear.
Third: Broadcast the distress call unto the furthest reaches of Imperial space with unflinching clarity.
Fourth: Seal the transmission in the Emperor's name, that none shall ignore this cry.
